The effects of planetary combinations in the 10"' from the Moon
given above are for guidance only as the characteristics of the sign in
which the 10'11 falls will also bear upon them. The strength of each
planet in the combination decides the percentage of its Karakathwa
entering the union. The stronger the planet. the more will be its
contribution. The effects of Mars-Jupiter combination In Cancer and
